rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts inside annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration.
Use component type scopes for interface-level assumptions and guarantees, implementation scopes for assign clauses.
generic_rules: Use const, eq, assume, and guarantee syntax consistently with AADL component scopes.
Encode visible feature names and constants in AGREE expressions when they are available.
Avoid referencing AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax includes: assume "label": expr; guarantee "label": expr; eq name : type = expr; const name : type = value; assign output = expr;
Component type annexes are for structural contracts; implementation annexes for bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assign clauses in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their scope in AGREE
Model fusion and architecture redesign during repair
